title: Identity Lock
description: A reference-led four-image identity-consistent series: one anchor portrait and three transformations that preserve the same face and body identity.
creative_direction: The first image establishes the model identity. Images 02-04 must preserve facial structure, age, skin tone, and camera logic while altering styling, grooming, or wardrobe direction.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01-anchor-portrait first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for the remaining series images. Queue may run the dependent images concurrently after the reference is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Identity Lock
en.description: A reference-led four-image identity-consistent series: one anchor portrait and three transformations that preserve the same face and body identity.

zh-CN.title: 身份锁定系列
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖同一基准肖像的身份一致系列图，在保持同一人物脸部和体态的前提下做三种变化。
